title: dalbergia debilis
intro: Dalbergia debilis, also known as Molave, is a tropical tree species native to the Philippines and Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, derived from its bark, leaves, and roots. The health benefits of Molave include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a natural remedy for wounds and infections. The herbal preparations of Molave include decoctions, infusions, and extracts of its various parts, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and topical applications.
